name: Omidyar Network
description: Omidyar Network is a philanthropic investment firm dedicated to harnessing the power of markets to create opportunity for people to improve their lives. Established in 2004 by eBay founder Pierre Omidyar and his wife Pam, the organization invests in and helps scale innovative organizations to catalyze economic and social change. It has committed more than $1.3 billion to for‑profit companies and nonprofit organizations across initiatives such as Financial Inclusion, Digital Identity, Education, Emerging Tech, Governance & Citizen Engagement, and Property Rights.
website_content:
### Welcoming Michele Jawando as Omidyar Network's Chief Executive Officer
Tech and policy leader, civil rights attorney, and longtime ON Executive to lead organization at pivotal moment for AI
[Find out more](https://omidyar.com/update/omidyar-network-appoints-michele-l-jawando-ceo/)

![](https://omidyar.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/DTS-Agustin-Farias-hero-2-1500x750.jpg)
# We envision a future where our shared humanity steers our digital future.
How can we hardwire humanity into our digital future?
AI opened a new window to collectively examine our relationship with tech and make intentional choices about the digital future we want. In ways large and small, we work with a broad network of visionaries and innovators to bend the arc of the digital revolution toward shared power, prosperity, and possibility. We focus on the key drivers of our shared digital future: culture, governance, business, and tech itself.
[](http://omidyar.com/priority/culture-of-tech/?source=home-page)

![In his home studio, a man smiles while playing the keyboard, seamlessly integrating music software on his computer.
